plugins.description: Runtime policy enforcement, prompt-injection scanning, MCP tool-poisoning detection, and tamper-evident (not tamper-proof) audit logging for Claude Code. Adapts Microsoft's Agent Governance Toolkit (MIT); independent project, not affiliated with or endorsed by Microsoft.
